heading: Port Ranges Used for Private Endpoints
body:
Atlas services are accessed through
GCP Private Service Connect endpoints on ports 1024-65535. The
ports can change under specific circumstances, including
(but not limited to) cluster changes. You may have to
update your firewall rules to allow egress traffic to the
new ports.

> **Important:** MongoDB strongly recommends using the DNS seedlist
> private endpoint-aware connection string, so that DNS
> automatically updates the ports that GCP Private Service Connect uses if
> they change. For the same reason, MongoDB also strongly
> recommends allow-listing the entire port range, instead
> of specific ports.
